settings.heading: Soft, sculpted, and made to move beautifully.
settings.subheading: A refined concept store for Peachees Fit—designed with a warmer, cleaner, logo-led identity and a more boutique feel.

settings.label: Collection
settings.heading: Three essentials, styled like a boutique drop.
settings.description: The demo focuses on three hero products with a premium, campaign-style presentation built around the brand’s warm, clean aesthetic.

settings.label: Brand Story
settings.heading: Luxury softness with gym-girl confidence.
settings.text:
This concept blends a calm, elevated layout with a stronger brand-forward identity inspired by the Peachees Fit aesthetic.

Warm neutrals, spacious composition, and strong product imagery make the shop feel more boutique than mass retail.

settings.label: Lookbook
settings.heading: Styled for pilates, errands, and lifts.
settings.description: This layout is built to present Peachees Fit as a curated drop, not a crowded catalog, with campaign-style visuals.

settings.label: Next Drop
settings.heading: Join the list for the next Peachees release.
settings.description: Discover the latest Peachees styles and join the list to be first in line for new arrivals, exclusive drops, and limited-edition releases.
